user.title: Connect to SberHome
user.description: Choose how to authorize with Sber smart home.

sms_phone.title: Sign in via SMS (beta)
sms_phone.description: Enter the phone number registered with Sber Home. Format: {example_phone}. We'll send a one-time SMS code.

sms_otp.title: Enter the SMS code
sms_otp.description: We sent a one-time code to {phone}.

reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: The SberHome authorization token has expired. Please sign in again ({method}).

abort.wrong_account: Signed in with a different Sber account than the original config entry. Sign in again with the correct account.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach Sber servers. Check the connection and try again.

error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number. Use international format like 78001234567.
error.send_otp_failed: Could not send the SMS code. Verify the number and try again later.
error.invalid_otp: The SMS code is wrong or expired. Request a new one if needed.

create_entry.default: Authorization successful. **No devices were imported automatically** — open the SberHome panel in the sidebar (or go to [/sberhome](/sberhome)) and pick which devices you want in Home Assistant. Until then the integration is connected but exposes no entities.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the API for device state updates (10 to 300 seconds)

send_custom_key.name: Send custom key
send_custom_key.description: Send a custom key press (confirm/back/home) to a SberHome TV.

send_direction.name: Send direction
send_direction.description: Send a D-pad direction (up/down/left/right) to a SberHome TV.

play_channel.name: Play channel
play_channel.description: Switch to a specific channel number on a SberHome TV.

conflicting_integration.title: Detected another Sber integration
conflicting_integration.description: Two integrations for Sber devices are installed: SberHome and {domains}. Running two integrations against the same Sber account at once can cause conflicts — intercepted state updates, incorrect mode display, command races. It is recommended to keep only one of them enabled.
